title: Dungeons Accurate Void Block
description: This adds the original minecraft dungeons:echoing void texture for the void block in goety!
body:
Replaces the void block texture from [Goety: The Dark Arts](https://modrinth.com/mod/goety)
with a more accurate recreation of the texture from [Minecraft Dungeons: Echoing Void](https://www.minecraft.net/en-us/store/minecraft-dungeons-echoing-void-dlc) 
thats basically it for this pack

enjoy!!!

also dont forget to install the upcoming Goety: End biomes rework by ratrod for the blocks to generate naturally
